title: AI Model Comparison Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Comparison Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50,50) scale(1)'>
<g id='card-container'>
<g transform='translate(0,0)'>
<rect id='card-rect' x='0' y='0' width='220' height='160' rx='8' fill='#B7D7CD' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'>
<g transform='translate(10,10)'>
<text id='card-name' x='10' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Model Name</text>
<rect id='card-name-background' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='20' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g transform='translate(10,40)'>
<text id='card-description' x='10' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Model Description</text>
<rect id='card-description-background' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g transform='translate(10,80)'>
<text id='card-performance' x='10' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Performance</text>
<rect id='card-performance-background' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g transform='translate(120,10)'>
<rect id='filter-button' x='0' y='0' width='150' height='30' fill='#C06C88' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/>
<text id='filter-text' x='10' y='10' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Filter</text>
<g transform='translate(280,10)'>
<rect id='sort-button' x='0' y='0' width='100' height='30' fill='#C06C88' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/>
<text id='sort-text' x='10' y='10' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Sort</text>
<g transform='translate(10,210)'>
<rect id='search-bar' x='0' y='0' width='380' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2' rx='4'/>
<text id='search-text' x='10' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Search</text>
<g transform='translate(20,220)'>
<g id='card-grid'>
<g id='card-1' transform='translate(10,10)'>
<rect id='card-rect-1' x='0' y='0' width='220' height='160' rx='8' fill='#B7D7CD' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
<g transform='translate(10,10)'>
<text id='card-name-1' x='10' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Model 1</text>
<rect id='card-name-background-1' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='20' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g transform='translate(10,40)'>
<text id='card-description-1' x='10' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Model 1 Description</text>
<rect id='card-description-background-1' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g transform='translate(10,80)'>
<text id='card-performance-1' x='10' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Model 1 Performance</text>
<rect id='card-performance-background-1' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g id='card-2' transform='translate(0,180)'>
<rect id='card-rect-2' x='0' y='0' width='220' height='160' rx='8' fill='#B7D7CD' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
<g transform='translate(10,10)'>
<text id='card-name-2' x='10' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Model 2</text>
<rect id='card-name-background-2' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='20' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g transform='translate(10,40)'>
<text id='card-description-2' x='10' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Model 2 Description</text>
<rect id='card-description-background-2' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g transform='translate(10,80)'>
<text id='card-performance-2' x='10' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Model 2 Performance</text>
<rect id='card-performance-background-2' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g id='card-3' transform='translate(240,10)'>
<rect id='card-rect-3' x='0' y='0' width='220' height='160' rx='8' fill='#B7D7CD' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
<g transform='translate(10,10)'>
<text id='card-name-3' x='10' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Model 3</text>
<rect id='card-name-background-3' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='20' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g transform='translate(10,40)'>
<text id='card-description-3' x='10' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Model 3 Description</text>
<rect id='card-description-background-3' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
<g transform='translate(10,80)'>
<text id='card-performance-3' x='10' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Model 3 Performance</text>
<rect id='card-performance-background-3' x='10' y='20' width='200' height='40' fill='#C06C88' rx='4'/>
</g></g></g></g></g></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use only the specified colors
Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must have a search bar to find a specific AI model
Must have a filter button to filter the cards by performance metric
Must have a sort button to sort the cards by name or performance metric

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Comparison Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filter logic, sort functionality, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
